title: WIN MR Protocol 2021_110 Lateralisation in fTCD and fMRI
author: Aikin, Nicola
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Protocol for the acquisition of MRI data for the study "2021_110 Lateralisation in fTCD and fMRI". 

 Conducted at the Wellcome Centre for Integrative Neuroimaging (WIN), University of Oxford. 

 Please see the entry of this protocol in the WIN MR Protocols Database to ensure this is the latest version:  https://open.win.ox.ac.uk/protocols/stable/a4e081ba-62e3-4ca6-bdbf-d9606e73bc3c . 

 Author list and CRediT roles:  

 Nicola Aikin: methodology 

 Zoe Woodhead: methodology, data curation 

 Sebastian Rieger: methodology 

 Juliet Semple: methodology 

 Dorothy Bishop: funding acquisition, supervision 

 Kate Watkins: methodology, supervision
